specific_question: In Q4 2024, did MediConn's customer service department receive any industry recognition?
answer: In Q4 2025, MediConn's customer service team received a Canadian Virtual Healthcare Customer Excellence Award for response time and patient satisfaction improvements.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
